## Review checklist

- [ ] The diff is focused and preserves unrelated work.
- [ ] Success, failure, and recovery paths are covered as applicable.
- [ ] Privacy or trust-boundary impact is described, or this has no such impact.
- [ ] Documentation, changelog, threat model, migration notes, and ADRs are updated or not applicable.
- [ ] Every commit has a DCO sign-off (`git commit -s`).
